response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with genuine strengths in testing culture, mentoring, and full-stack delivery, but he does not meet this role's core minimum qualifications. His professional C++ experience is roughly one year (National Instruments, 2014-2015) against a hard requirement of 8 years, and his career centers on web and product engineering in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than cloud compute platforms. His closest match is the low-latency, high-throughput work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, which is relevant but brief, and he has no formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests per second)
Strong engineering-practices background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and test tooling authorship
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing record through workshops, courses, and long-running open-source maintainership
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ minimum, with only about one year of professional C/C++ work a decade ago
Career is predominantly web/full-stack product development, not large-scale infrastructure or cloud compute platforms
No formal technical-lead or people-leadership role owning cross-team strategy, priorities, and deliverables

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud platform and technical leadership track record
